reviews.review_description:
This app is very informative but sadly lacks a seated option which being disabled is essential as I'm unable to stand for very long at a time 
The graphics are pretty good
Overall very happy with my purchase just need a seated mode please

I found this pretty interesting.  You start off in a room and have to find certain objects.  Once you find an object for a part of the journey, it then provides a very high-quality re-creation of that part of the trip.  Devs - as an enhancement, can you add a way to turn off the VR vignettes as well as a seated mode.

developer_response.body: We’re really happy you found our experience interesting! Thank you so much for your feedback — we’ve removed the vignette issue, so if you update the app now, it’s all fixed. As for the seated mode, that’s a great suggestion and we’re planning to add it in a future update!

reviews.review_description: Updated review: vignette issue fixed. Really enjoyed this, well done.
